verifyEmail.title: Email verification

errors.invalidToken: This verification link is invalid or has already been used.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.requestSubtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link
resetPassword.emailSent: If an account exists for this email, you will receive a password reset link shortly. Check your inbox.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid. Please request a new one.
errors.tokenExpired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.

errors.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.useGoogleSignin: This account was created with Google. Please use the 'Continue with Google' button.
errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email address
errors.resetFailed: Password reset failed. Please try again.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters

features.title: Turn self-improvement into a measurable, gamified experience.
features.description: Track goals, build habits, and level up your life with XP-based progress tracking.

setGoals.title: Set Goals
setGoals.description: Create personal objectives across fitness, learning, and productivity.

earnXP.title: Earn XP
earnXP.description: Complete tasks and earn experience points to track your progress.

trackStreaks.title: Track Streaks
trackStreaks.description: Build consistency with streak counters and real-time progress charts.

visualize.title: Visualize
visualize.description: See your growth with beautiful charts and dynamic feedback.

level.description: View all levels, rewards, and requirements

hero.subtitle: You're on a {streak}-day streak. Keep climbing!

tasks.title: Today
tasks.subtitle: Habits and goals scheduled for today
tasks.emptyDescription: Add a habit or goal to get started.

missions.title: Today's missions
missions.subtitle: What you're aiming to do today
missions.emptyDescription: Add a mission to get started and earn XP.
missions.dailyQuestReward: Complete {target} missions today → +{xp} XP and +{gold} gold

missionModal.typeHintHabit: A routine to repeat — great for building behavior (e.g. drink water, read).
missionModal.typeHintGoal: A one-off task to check off — great for a specific deliverable (e.g. finish a report).

rewards.title: Rewards marketplace
rewards.description: Convert your effort into meaningful incentives

analytics.title: Analytics & progress
analytics.description: Understand the story behind your consistency

profile.title: Profile & settings
profile.description: Personalize how Ascent supports your growth

avatarPicker.title: Choose your avatar
avatarPicker.description: Select a predefined avatar. Unlock more by leveling up.

streakModal.goalUnlock: Reach a 7-day streak to unlock exclusive rewards.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Spend your gold on rewards that motivate you. Below are ideas you can use as inspiration.
shop.ideasDescription: Examples to inspire your own rewards — set your goals and treat yourself when you reach them.
shop.customDescription: Define personal rewards and assign your own price.
shop.myRewardsEmpty: You haven't created any custom rewards yet.
shop.deleteHasRedemptions: You cannot delete a reward that has already been redeemed.

book.title: Fine dining night
book.description: Book a top restaurant to celebrate your progress

spa.description: A one-night trip to a city you've wanted to visit

gadget.title: Premium setup upgrade
gadget.description: A high-end item that makes your daily work feel better

dinner.title: Guilt-free day off
dinner.description: A full day to unplug and recharge with zero guilt

running.title: Dream sneakers
running.description: The pair you've been eyeing for weeks

course.title: VIP concert ticket
course.description: A live event you love, with a premium experience

massage.title: Massage + spa reset
massage.description: A full recovery session to reward your consistency

concert.title: Signature food experience
concert.description: Chef's tasting menu or a standout local spot

headphones.title: Nature escape day
headphones.description: A hike, cabin day, or off-grid reset

weekend.title: Luxury date night
weekend.description: Dinner plus a memorable activity without budget stress

gym.title: Premium fitness pack
gym.description: New coaching, classes, or gear to level up

meditation.title: Wishlist splurge
meditation.description: That bigger treat you've delayed for too long

welcome.title: Welcome to Ascent!
welcome.body: Let's take a quick tour and set up your first missions. It only takes a few minutes.

playerBar.title: Your command center
playerBar.body: Everything about your progress lives up here — profile, level, streak, and gold.

avatar.title: Your avatar
avatar.body: Tap here anytime to change your look. New avatars unlock as you level up.

dailyLogin.title: Daily reward
dailyLogin.body: Every day, a small reward waits just for opening the app. Tap the gift to collect it.

level.title: Your level
level.body: Tap here to open your level ladder. A red badge appears when rewards are ready to claim.

levelModal.title: Level ladder
levelModal.body: When you level up, rewards glow here — tap Claim to collect your gold. Nothing is given automatically!

streak.title: Your streak
streak.body: Tap the flame to open your streak calendar and track your consistency.

streakModal.title: Streak calendar
streakModal.body: Complete at least one mission per day to keep your streak alive. Hit 7 days in a row to unlock special rewards.

gold.title: Your gold
gold.body: Gold builds up as you progress. Spend it in the shop on rewards you set for yourself — a treat, an outing, something you actually want.

missions.title: Your daily missions
missions.body: Every mission you complete moves you forward. Consistency beats perfection — a few actions each day add up fast.

addMission.title: Create your first mission
addMission.body: Now it's your turn — tap here and add a habit or goal that's meaningful to you.

dailyQuest.title: Daily quest
dailyQuest.body: Complete 3 missions in a day to unlock bonus XP and gold. Small daily effort, big impact on your progress.

shopNav.title: Visit the shop
shopNav.body: Tap your gold balance to open the shop — that's where you create rewards to spend your gold on.

createReward.title: Create a personal reward
createReward.body: Name something you'd enjoy — a treat, activity, or purchase — and set how much gold it costs.

backDashboard.title: Back to your missions
backDashboard.body: Head back to the dashboard. One last thing awaits: completing your tutorial mission.

completeTutorial.title: Complete your tutorial mission
completeTutorial.body: Tap the checkmark to finish. Completing a mission earns XP — this one might even level you up!

claimLevel.title: You leveled up!
claimLevel.body: The red badge means a reward is ready. Tap your level to see what's waiting.

claimLevelModal.title: Open your reward
claimLevelModal.body: Your new level is unlocked. Collect your gold — you'll spend it in the shop.

done.title: You're all set!
done.body: You know how missions, XP, gold, and rewards work. Now go crush your goals!
